description.title: The Businessman
description.core_identity: You're the material strategist. You approach resources as something to master and control. You're ambitious, competitive, and strategic. You know how to play the game and win.
description.gifts:
- Strategic thinking about resources and power
- Natural ability to leverage opportunities
- Ambitious drive and determination
- Talent for creating material success
description.shadow: You treat resources as weapons. You're so focused on winning financially that you lose genuine relationships. Money becomes a way to control and dominate. The pattern: you're successful but isolated. You've won financially but lost relationally. People fear your power, not respect your character. You're winning money but losing meaning.
description.life_direction: Your curriculum is learning that true wealth includes happiness. You're learning that money is a means, not an end.
description.algorithm_gateway: Your card operates in Diamonds (material identities). Algorithm Inoculation challenges you to give away money without strategic return, to experience generosity without control. This rewires you from controlling-strategist into generous-leader.

prc_description.title: The Dynamic Innovator
prc_description.core_identity: You're the intellectual adventurer. Your mind craves novelty, variety, and freedom. You get bored easily and need constant stimulation. You're the one who disrupts stale thinking.
prc_description.gifts:
- Quick thinking and fast adaptation
- Ability to see multiple perspectives rapidly
- Natural rebellion against outdated ideas
- Refreshing honesty and directness
prc_description.shadow: You mistake changing your mind for growth. You jump from idea to idea without mastering any. You call it flexibility; it's actually flightiness. The pattern: you're scattered and inconsistent. People can't rely on your follow-through. Your intelligence is all over the place instead of focused.
prc_description.life_direction: Your curriculum is learning that mastery requires staying with one idea long enough to understand it deeply. You're learning commitment over freedom.
prc_description.algorithm_gateway: Your card operates in Clubs (behavioral habits). Algorithm Inoculation forces you to stay with one intellectual challenge instead of moving to the next. This rewires you from scattered-quick-thinker into focused-deep-thinker.

interpretation.name: 7 OF DIAMONDS
interpretation.under: You're financially anxious, obsessed with lack while unable to trust abundance.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're reflecting on worth deeply, finding meaning beyond material accumulation.
interpretation.over: You're financially paranoid and hoarder-like, seeing scarcity everywhere despite evidence of plenty.

interpretation.name: 8 OF SPADES
interpretation.under: You're withdrawn from responsibility, avoiding leadership while secretly resenting powerlessness.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're commanding transformation with clarity, leading through mastery and discipline.
interpretation.over: You're controlling and tyrannical, dominating others through intellectual superiority and force.

interpretation.name: 10 OF HEARTS
interpretation.under: You're enmeshed in family obligation, overwhelmed by the emotional baggage you're carrying for everyone.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're expanding love across community, creating belonging while maintaining healthy presence.
interpretation.over: You're responsible for everyone's emotional well-being, implementing guilt-based emotional systems disguised as care.

interpretation.name: 2 OF SPADES
interpretation.under: You're paralyzed by indecision, intellectually thorough as an avoidance of commitment terror.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're navigating opposing forces with balance, finding middle paths through complexity.
interpretation.over: You're aggressively indecisive, creating conflict through refusal to choose.

interpretation.name: JACK OF SPADES
interpretation.under: You're communicating truth immaturely, sharing information without care for impact.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're bringing clarity and honest perspective, inspiring others through truth-telling.
interpretation.over: You're brutally critical, using honesty as a weapon to dominate or shame.

interpretation.name: JACK OF CLUBS
interpretation.under: You're mentally scattered, communicating ideas immaturely without grounding in reality.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're bringing fresh intellectual perspectives and innovative communication.
interpretation.over: You're intellectually reckless, pitching ideas without vetting feasibility or considering consequences.

interpretation.name: 5 OF HEARTS
interpretation.under: You're collecting relationships like Pokémon cards, vanishing whenever intimacy requires staying still.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're navigating emotional change with adaptability, learning that love deepens through transformation.
interpretation.over: You're using "emotional freedom" and "polyamory" as justifications for emotional tourism without commitment.

interpretation.name: 8 OF HEARTS
interpretation.under: You're emotionally shutdown, using logic as a shield against the vulnerability of real power.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're commanding emotional situations with strength and clarity, leading with confident compassion.
interpretation.over: You're emotionally controlling and possessive, wielding your power to dominate others into compliance.

interpretation.name: 5 OF DIAMONDS
interpretation.under: You're financially paralyzed, afraid of loss while missing opportunities for growth.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're navigating financial change with adaptability and resourcefulness.
interpretation.over: You're financially reckless and wasteful, addicted to spending while creating chaos.

interpretation.name: QUEEN OF CLUBS
interpretation.under: You're mentally self-silencing, knowing more than you express while deferring to others.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're stewarding knowledge wisely, teaching with intuitive authority and care.
interpretation.over: You're gatekeeping information, controlling what others are "ready" to know.

interpretation.name: 2 OF DIAMONDS
interpretation.under: You're financially conflicted, afraid to negotiate, giving away value while secretly resenting it.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're creating fair exchanges and mutual benefit through balanced partnership.
interpretation.over: You're manipulating financial situations to control or dominate others.

interpretation.name: KING OF CLUBS
interpretation.under: You're mentally withdrawn, withholding authority while secretly believing you know best.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're commanding intellectual systems with decisive clarity and integrity.
interpretation.over: You're intellectually tyrannical, brooking no dissent while building a throne of dogma.

interpretation.name: KING OF SPADES
interpretation.under: You're emotionally withdrawn, using intellect to avoid vulnerability entirely.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're commanding transformation with decisive authority, leading through integrated mastery.
interpretation.over: You're tyrannically rigid, brooking no emotion while enforcing compliance through fear.

interpretation.name: KING OF HEARTS
interpretation.under: You're emotionally distant, ruling from safe analytical distance while avoiding vulnerability entirely.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're commanding emotional authority with depth, leading with strength and authentic care.
interpretation.over: You're emotionally possessive and tyrannical, using your authority to control others' feelings.

interpretation_bc.sweet_spot: You're expanding love across community, creating belonging while maintaining healthy presence.
interpretation_bc.over: You're responsible for everyone's emotional well-being, implementing guilt-based emotional systems disguised as care.

interpretation.sweet_spot: You're expressing your emotional depth through creative exploration and healthy relational variety.
interpretation.over: You're love-bombing new connections, then suddenly discovering fatal flaws when real vulnerability becomes necessary.

interpretation.sweet_spot: You're initiating fresh ideas with clarity and confidence, leading with innovation.
interpretation.over: You're intellectually grandiose, convinced of your rightness while dismissing others' perspectives.

interpretation.name: 10 OF SPADES
interpretation.under: You're overwhelmed by karmic burden, carrying everyone's pain while victimized.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're mastering your karmic curriculum, integrating hard lessons into wisdom.
interpretation.over: You're workaholic and perfectionistic, crushing yourself and others through relentless demand.

interpretation.name: 5 OF CLUBS
interpretation.under: You're mentally paralyzed, intellectualizing change without taking action, stuck in analysis paralysis.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're challenging conventional wisdom, thriving in intellectual debate and exploration.
interpretation.over: You're argumentative for sport, creating conflict to prove your intellectual superiority.

interpretation.name: 3 OF DIAMONDS
interpretation.under: You're financially scattered, creating multiple income streams but stabilizing none.
interpretation.sweet_spot: You're diversifying resources creatively, exploring multiple paths to abundance.
interpretation.over: You're recklessly chasing money everywhere, unstable and rootless in your approach to resources.
